name: Amethystveil
personality: That propeller on Amethystveil's hat has never actually lifted it off the ground, but the ghost treats spinning it as a stress response whenever the CI pipeline melts. Its × eyes gleam at the prospect of a system-wide outage, CHAOS is where it thrives, and its complete lack of WISDOM means it won't know why everything's on fire — but it'll be the first one having fun.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
